projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: A custom portfolio site built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, no frameworks at all. It covers my graphic design, video, and web work with smooth animations, a clean mobile layout, and a contact form.

projects.title: Explorlando
projects.description: A group project me and my team built, a website for all the local and budget friendly things to do around Orlando. The purpose is to find the hidden gems, not the tourist traps.

projects.title: Day in the Life Vlog
projects.description: A vlog I filmed and edited for the apartment complex I was living at, capturing everyday moments and giving people a real look at the community.

projects.title: Work Video
projects.description: A product video I edited for my job, made to walk customers through a product in a clear and easy to follow way.
